semantic.role: Metadata index entry for a documentation file (README.md) within the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Tracking file identity and content integrity via hashes
Recording semantic analysis results for documentation files
Maintaining dependency graph and provenance metadata
invariants: Content hash must match the actual file content at indexing time
Semantic hash must be consistent with the extracted meaning
Language field must reflect the detected programming or document language

English.role: Metadata index entry for a documentation file (README.md) within the ArchSpine mirror system

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Version of the metadata schema used for this entry
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: Relative path of the indexed file within the repository
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: SHA-256 hash of the file content for integrity verification
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: Hash representing the semantic meaning extracted from the file
parameter_definitions.identity.language: Detected language of the file (e.g., 'unsupported' for non-code files)
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: Classification of the file (e.g., 'document' for README files)
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: Scope or module this file belongs to (empty for root-level files)
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: Functional purpose of this file within the system
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: List of subsystems or concerns this file addresses
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: Concerns explicitly not covered by this file
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: Mandatory constraints or safety limits defined by this file
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: Original architectural purpose of the file
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Purpose of the most recent modification
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: Public API or interface elements exposed by this file
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: Detected violations of system rules or conventions
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: Whether the file has drifted from its expected state
parameter_definitions.skeleton.imports: List of external dependencies imported by this file
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: List of symbols exported by this file
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: Whether this file acts as a barrel (re-export) module
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: Whether this file contains only type definitions
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: Files that this file depends on
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: Files that depend on this file
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: Whether the reverse dependency index is fully populated
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: Timestamp when this file was indexed
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: Version of the indexing tool used

English.stability_and_risks: This metadata entry itself does not affect system stability directly, as it is a passive index record. However, inconsistencies between the content hash and actual file content can indicate file tampering or corruption. A mismatch in semantic hash may signal that the file's meaning has changed without re-indexing. The dependency graph (dependsOn/dependedBy) helps identify cascading impacts when files are modified. Drift detection flags files that have deviated from their expected state, which is critical for maintaining system integrity. The provenance information ensures traceability of when and how the index was generated.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine镜像系统中文档文件（README.md）的元数据索引条目

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 用于此条目的元数据模式版本
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: 仓库中被索引文件的相对路径
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: 文件内容的SHA-256哈希值，用于完整性验证
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: 从文件中提取的语义含义的哈希表示
parameter_definitions.identity.language: 检测到的文件语言（例如，非代码文件标记为'unsupported'）
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: 文件分类（例如，README文件标记为'document'）
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: 此文件所属的作用域或模块（根级文件为空）
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: 此文件在系统中的功能用途
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: 此文件负责处理的子系统或关注点列表
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: 此文件明确不涵盖的关注点
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: 此文件定义的强制性约束或安全限制
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: 文件的原始架构设计目的
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: 此文件暴露的公共API或接口元素
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: 检测到的违反系统规则或约定的行为
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: 文件是否已偏离其预期状态
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: 任何检测到的偏离的解释
parameter_definitions.skeleton.imports: 此文件导入的外部依赖列表
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: 此文件导出的符号列表
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: 此文件是否充当桶模块（重新导出）
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: 此文件是否仅包含类型定义
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: 此文件依赖的其他文件
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: 依赖此文件的其他文件
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: 反向依赖索引是否已完全填充
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: 此文件被索引的时间戳
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: 索引过程中应用的各个处理阶段

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此元数据条目本身是被动的索引记录，不会直接影响系统稳定性。然而，内容哈希与实际文件内容不一致可能表明文件被篡改或损坏。语义哈希不匹配可能意味着文件含义已更改但未重新索引。依赖关系图（dependsOn/dependedBy）有助于识别文件修改时的级联影响。漂移检测功能会标记已偏离预期状态的文件，这对维护系统完整性至关重要。溯源信息确保索引生成的时间和方式可追溯。
